zh.Spreyton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文斯普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Chichester於1385年1月9日出生在英國戴文時，他的父親John Chichester33歲，母親Thomasine Raleigh20歲。他於1420年與Alice Wotton在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1437年12月14日在英國英格蘭戴文法爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.Spreyton, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文斯普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Chichester于1385年1月9日出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲John Chichester33岁，母亲Thomasine Raleigh20岁。他于1420年与Alice Wotton在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1437年12月14日在英国英格兰戴文法爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chichester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Chichester in Sussex, probably named with the Old English personal name Cissa + Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort’. (Cissa is attested as the name of a historical person; it is of uncertain etymology.) Alternatively, the first element may be an Old English word cisse ‘gravelly feature’.

variants.name: Chidester
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Chichester  . It is not found in English records.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Chichester was born on 9 January 1385, in Devon, England, his father, John Chichester, was 33 and his mother, Thomasine Raleigh, was 20. He married Alice Wotton in 1420, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 December 1437, in Farleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Chichester est né le 9 janvier 1385, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Chichester, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Raleigh, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Wotton en 1420, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 décembre 1437, à Farleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Chichester am 9. Januar 1385 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Chichester 33 und seine Mutter Thomasine Raleigh 20. Er hat 1420 in Devon, England Alice Wotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Dezember 1437 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Farleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Chichester è nato il il 9 gennaio 1385 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, John Chichester, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Thomasine Raleigh, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice Wotton nel 1420, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 dicembre 1437, nel Farleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Chichesterが1385年1月9日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Chichesterは33歳，母Thomasine Raleighは20歳であった。1420年にイギリスデボンでAlice Wottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1437年12月14日にイギリスイギリスデボンファルレイグで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Chichester(이)가 1385년 1월 9일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Chichester(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Raleigh(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 데폰에서 Alice Wotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1437년 12월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 패를리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.9 January 1385–14 December 1437: 9 de janeiro de 1385–14 de dezembro de 1437
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Chichester nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1385, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Chichester, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Raleigh, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Wotton em 1420, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1437, em Farleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Chichester родился 9 января 1385 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Chichester было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Raleigh, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Wotton в 1420 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 декабря 1437 г. в местности фарлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.9 January 1385–14 December 1437: 9 de enero de 1385–14 de diciembre de 1437
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Chichester nació el 9 de enero de 1385, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Chichester, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Thomasine Raleigh, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alice Wotton en 1420, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1437, en Farleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
